WARNING: These test points are for A3114 (820-03285) ONLY. Component designators are board-specific. This board uses M3 AWAKE naming, ACE3 MagSafe, MACAW retimers, and Willamette WiFi.
description: Decision trees for 5V DCPS scenarios. Board connected via USB-C at 5V (pre-PD negotiation). M3 topology with ACE3 MagSafe, MACAW retimers, Willamette WiFi.

scenarios.meaning: Board draws nothing. Port controller is not loading VBUS. Fault at input stage.

steps.expected: Clean pins, no bent/missing contacts, no liquid residue

steps.if_wrong: DCPS cable or connector fault. Try other port (CF501 for ATC1).

steps.measure: Diode mode on UF400 VDD pins
Move DCPS to second port, probe CF501
steps.if_works: First port UF400 fault. Replace UF400.
steps.if_both_dead: Both port controllers dead or upstream connector flex fault.

scenarios.meaning: Port controller draws some current but board not progressing. PPBUS_AON likely not coming up.

steps.if_missing: Charger circuit fault. Go to step 2.

steps.if_wrong: PPBUS_AON shorted. Thermal cam to find hot component.

steps.measure: Probe PP3V8_AON output (U5700 output area, page 35)
steps.if_missing: U5700 (SVR AON, APN 351002645) fault. Check P3V8AON_PWR_EN and P3V8AON_FAULT_L.

steps.action: Check PP3V8_AON for short on VDDMAIN

steps.measure: Probe PP5V_S2 output from UC300 (LN84243-1, page 51)
steps.if_missing: UC300 or P5VS2_PWR_EN gating fault (check UC637/UC630 logic, page 52).

steps.if_all_present: Fault downstream of PMU. Investigate SoC domains.

steps.measure: Apply thermal cam to rail that is missing/shorted

scenarios.meaning: Moderate current. Charger circuit partially working. Something downstream is loading or shorted.

steps.measure: Diode mode on PP3V3_S2 output from UC710 (page 53)
steps.if_wrong: PP3V3_S2 rail shorted. Check UC710 output caps.

scenarios.range: 0.2-0.5A (significant current, boot stalled or shorted rail)
scenarios.meaning: Board trying to boot or rail has significant short.

steps.action: Check for signs of boot (fan, backlight, chime)
steps.if_signs: Board booting at 5V but PD negotiation failing. Check port controller firmware ROM.
steps.if_no_signs: Run full diagnostic chain. Thermal cam all power domains.

steps.action: Connect to 20V DCPS and check if board transitions
steps.if_normal_boot: PD negotiation issue. Check port controller / ROM.

scenarios.meaning: Very high current at 5V. Serious short or boot attempt.

steps.note: High current at 5V with battery can cause heating.

steps.if_wrong: PPBUS_AON dead short. Thermal cam immediately.
PP3V8_AON dead short. U5700 pulling max current into short. Thermal cam.

steps.action: Switch to 20V to check if actually booting
steps.if_boots: Normal. Board was trying to boot at 5V.
steps.if_same: Genuine short. Systematic thermal cam sweep.
